zh.title: 狗狗币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前DOGE/USD处于短线弱势震荡结构，价格持续运行于20日均线下方，整体趋势偏空但未出现单边下跌，市场更多表现为低位整理格局。  

MACD柱值维持负区间且动能未见收敛，短期空头动能占优；价格低于SMA20约2.2%，均线压制明显，反弹缺乏量能配合信号偏弱。  

下方关键支撑位关注0.0729附近，一旦失守或打开进一步回落空间；上方阻力位0.0736及0.0753，分别对应日内高点与20日均线。  

操作上建议以反弹分批减仓或高空思路为主，若站稳0.0753上方则短线结构改善，可考虑轻仓跟随反弹但仍需控制风险波动交易纪律。

en.title: Dogecoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
DOGE/USD is showing a mild bearish consolidation phase after failing to sustain levels above its short-term moving average. Price action remains compressed near the lower end of the recent intraday range, indicating weakening bullish momentum. The market structure suggests lower highs forming, with buyers stepping in only at micro dips. Overall sentiment is cautious, with no clear breakout direction yet established.

DOGE/USD is trading below the 20-day SMA at 0.07534, reinforcing a short-term bearish bias as price fails to reclaim the dynamic resistance. The MACD reading at -0.000945 confirms negative momentum, suggesting sellers still dominate recent flows. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation relies heavily on price structure and MACD behavior. The absence of bullish divergence indicates limited reversal strength at current levels.

DOGE/USD immediate support lies at the session low of 0.07298, a level that has repeatedly absorbed selling pressure. A breakdown could expose the psychological 0.07000 zone as the next major downside target. On the upside, resistance is seen at 0.07355, followed by stronger supply near the 20-day SMA at 0.07534, where prior rejection has already occurred, which would likely accelerate bearish momentum.

DOGE/USD traders may consider a range-bound strategy, favoring short-term scalps between 0.07298 support and 0.07355 resistance until a clear breakout emerges. Risk management is critical, with tight stops below 0.07290 for longs and above 0.07360 for shorts. A sustained move above the SMA20 would be required to shift bias toward bullish continuation and open recovery targets, with confirmation dependent on volume expansion.
